sentence: Inasmuch as you are their leader, you are responsible.
He gripped his bag tightly lest he should lose it.
Shut the window, otherwise it will be cold.
I won't go unless you come with me.
She is very quiet, whereas her sister is noisy.
You can go out, provided that you finish your homework.
The hike was difficult; nonetheless, they reached the summit.
Notwithstanding the rain, the match continued.
The roads were icy; hence, the accident happened.
The house is beautiful; furthermore, it's very cheap.
He was late; consequently, he missed the bus.
It's a great car; moreover, it's very fuel-efficient.
They escaped by means of a secret tunnel.
In spite of his injury, he won the race.
I will stay as long as you need me.
The flight was delayed on account of bad weather.
He studied hard so as to pass the exam.
I don't know whether he will come.
The oil prices rose, thus causing inflation.
In the event of fire, use the stairs.
